title: Bionano Genomics (Nasdaq:BNGO) - Stock Analysis
text: Bionano Genomics is a molecular diagnostics company focused on optical genome mapping technology for genetic analysis. The company serves diagnostic laboratories, healthcare providers, and research institutions. Key business segments include product sales (instruments), consumables (flow cells), and software licensing. Financial metrics show improving gross margins and reducing operating expenses, though revenue remains modest at under $30M annually. The company's installed base of 387 OGM systems represents a core asset, generating recurring consumables revenue. Strategic focus on routine-use customers provides revenue stability. Recent reimbursement wins (CPT codes 81195 and 81354) unlock commercial opportunities in hematologic malignancies and constitutional genetic disorders. Balance sheet improved significantly with 46% gross margin in 2025 and cash position supporting operations into 2027. Going concern disclosures indicate management is focused on achieving profitability and cash flow breakeven. Key risks include technology adoption rates, competitive threats, and execution on commercial strategy.
